cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are a bunch of partner switches, so I need to track each one step by step. Let me start by writing down the initial pairings. At the start: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga So the partners are: Alice ↔ Lola Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Dave ↔ Sam Eve ↔ Helga Now, the first switch is Dave and Alice switching partners. Let me visualize that. So Dave is originally with Sam, and Alice is with Lola. After they switch, Dave will be with Lola and Alice will be with Sam. Let me update the pairings: After first switch (Dave and Alice): - Alice is now with Sam (previously Dave's partner) - Dave is now with Lola (previously Alice's partner) Others remain the same: Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Eve ↔ Helga Second switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. So Eve is currently with Helga, and Alice is with Sam. After switching, Eve will have Sam, and Alice will have Helga. Let me update: After second switch (Eve and Alice): - Alice is now with Helga - Eve is now with Sam Dave ↔ Lola Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob is currently with Karl, Dave is with Lola. After switching, Bob will be with Lola, and Dave will be with Karl. Updating: After third switch (Bob and Dave): - Bob is now with Lola - Dave is now with Karl Alice ↔ Helga Eve ↔ Sam Claire ↔ Patrick Fourth switch: Bob and Eve switch partners. Bob is currently with Lola, Eve is with Sam. After switching, Bob will have Sam, and Eve will have Lola. Updating: After fourth switch (Bob and Eve): - Bob is now with Sam - Eve is now with Lola Dave ↔ Karl Alice ↔ Helga Claire ↔ Patrick Fifth and final switch: Bob and Claire switch partners.
